content:
Goal
* Please change "Cells" to "Positions".

Input
* Please change "<>" to "<<Next line:>>".

* Please change "Two integers" to "Two space-separated integers" (for both Line 1 and the last line).

Constraints
* Please change 100 to 10.

Cases
* Please add Test 5 and Validator 5 where:
  • [[H]] > [[W]] > 3
  • [[R]] > [[C]], and
  • all grid values are random negative 2-digit integers.

* Please add Test 6 and Validator 6 where:
  • [[H]] > [[W]] > 4
  • [[C]] = [[W]] - 1, and
  • all grid values are random negative 3-digit integers.

* Please add Test 7 and Validator 7 where:
  • (the order is different) [[W]] > [[H]] > 5
  • [[R]] = [[H]] - 1, and
  • all grid values are random positive 3-digit integers.

* Please add Test 8 and Validator 8 where:
  • [[W]] = [[H]] = 10
  • [[C]] > [[R]] > 0, and
  • all grid values are random integers from the entire range between -1000 and 1000.

Thanks.
